logoutConfirm.title: Log out?
logoutConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to log out?

common.featureUnavailable: This feature is not yet available on the server.
common.testDataTooltip: Training / test data — not a real lot
common.showingFirstN: Showing the most recent {{n}} — older rows are not loaded.

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait before retrying.
errors.notRegistered: This mobile number is not registered. Contact your admin.
errors.generic: Could not sign in. Please try again.

floor.title: Floor
floor.editRequestBody: This lot's 24-hour edit window has passed. Send a request to the admin to make changes?
floor.bulkSelectHint: Long-press a card to select multiple.

stitching.title: Stitching

rework.needsRework: {{count}} item(s) need rework — sent back from finishing

stitching.masterNoAssignments: New lots are assigned by the floor manager — they'll show up here.

receiveFromKotty.title: Receive from Kotty
receiveFromKotty.subtitle: Capture the challan, then per-size quantities for each style.
receiveFromKotty.styleIdHint: New combos generate a fresh NOWI Style ID (e.g. NOWIWDR1001) on save.
receiveFromKotty.applyToAll: Apply size matrix to all styles

lot.title: Receive at stitching
lot.freshLot: This lot just arrived — nothing to forward yet. Start stitching, then come back to record forwards.
lot.scrapHint: Scrapping units removes them from the lot permanently. {{max}} available in size {{size}}.
lot.forwardHint: Tap size to forward all, or set quantity manually.

finishing.title: Finishing
finishing.photoRequired: A defect photo is required to send a rework.

dispatch.notReady: Nothing ready to dispatch yet — finish at least one size first.
dispatch.noItems: Enter at least one quantity to ship.

approvalCta.title: {{count}} styles awaiting your approval
approvalCta.subtitle: Approval #1 — review intake checks and mint the Style #.
approvalCta.allCaughtUp: No styles awaiting your approval — all caught up.

styles.title: Sampling
styles.subtitle: Every design in flight — submitted, in sampling, parked, or sent to production.

widgets.note: Full dashboard archived — these widgets live here now

table.empty: No styles. Click "New design submission" to create one.
table.queueNote: Approve opens the Approval #1 checks. New designs go to sampling; colour & based-on skip to production.

intake.title: New intake
intake.sourceHelp: Switching to China Import shows a simplified intake form — no sampling workflow.
intake.developmentReasonPh: e.g. Filling a gap in the women's bottom-wear range for AW26
intake.inspirationSubtitle: Paste a link, we'll fetch the image — or drop one in.
intake.newCategoryHelp: Adds a row to the Category master so the Style ID generator can use it.
intake.newCollectionHelp: Adds a row to the Collection master (e.g. a seasonal drop).
intake.newFabricHelp: Quick-add a fabric so you can keep submitting. You can flesh out composition and pricing later in the Fabric Library.
intake.needsName: Add a working name to submit

fork.title: What are you submitting?
fork.subtitle: Pick the path — it decides whether this design samples.
fork.newDesc: A net-new design. Runs the full sampling workflow.
fork.colourDesc: Same design, a new colour. Skips sampling.
fork.basedOnDesc: A different design that reused an approved sample. Skips sampling.
fork.reliveDesc: Re-release a past design. Skips sampling; keeps a link to the old style #.
fork.thirdPartyDesc: Finished goods from a partner. Their style code becomes the Style #. Skips sampling.
fork.thirdPartyHelp: Stored exactly as entered and used as the Style # — the SKUs and dispatch codes derive from it, so it must match what the warehouse already uses. Must be unique.
fork.pickPlaceholder: Search a style or type a code
fork.colourHelp: Inherits the family — fabric, gender, category and CAD come from the parent.
fork.basedOnHelp: Records sampling provenance only. This stays its own independent style.
fork.reliveHelp: Type the old style # — even if it's a legacy code not in the system. It's saved as a searchable reference and linked when it matches.
fork.needsTarget: Pick the style this is based on to submit

workspace.withdrawConfirmBody: This style has already passed Approval #1. Withdrawing pulls a committed design out of the pipeline and parks it. You can revive it later. Continue?
workspace.easyecomHint: Marking this done takes the listed channels live.
workspace.easyecomHintBlocked: Add at least one marketplace listing (with its link) first — then this takes the style live.
workspace.channelsNone: No listings yet. Use "Add listings" to add a channel + its link.
workspace.coloursAfterApproval: Colours are added after sample approval — not during sampling.
workspace.colourFamilySubtitle: Same design, different colours — grouped as "other colours" on marketplaces.

approval1.dialogIntro: Confirm the intake checks before approving this style.
approval1.notePlaceholder: Anything worth recording about this approval…

goLive.dialogIntro: Select each channel this style is listed on and paste its public listing URL. Listings go live automatically once EasyEcom is marked done.
goLive.mrpOutOfBand: Outside the suggested ₹{{min}}–₹{{max}} (3–3.5× cost) — saved as entered.

addColour.title: Add colour variant
addColour.newColourHelp: All inherited fields above are copied automatically. Just pick the new colour.
addColour.mintHint: A new style number will be minted on approval.
addColour.thirdPartyMintHint: The partner code becomes this colour’s Style # — nothing is minted.
addColour.thirdPartyCodeHelp: Stored verbatim as this colour’s Style # (no minting), so its per-size SKUs match the partner’s EasyEcom catalog.
addColour.thirdPartyCodeRequired: Enter the partner style code for this colour.

patternCad.label: Pattern / CAD
patternCad.dxfError: Could not render this DXF — open or download the file.

park.approvedWarning: This style has already passed Approval #1 — re-parking pulls a committed design out of the pipeline. Only admins and sampling leads can do this.

chinaImport.title: China Import
chinaImport.subtitle: Imported styles (NW- prefixed) — a simple, separate flow.

fabricChallan.title: Receive fabric
fabricChallan.subtitle: Record a supplier challan. Each line adds stock to that fabric.
fabricChallan.notePh: Transport mode, vehicle no., anything off the slip…

fabricLibrary.title: Fabric Library
fabricLibrary.subtitle: Master list of fabrics and types used across all styles.

comp.title: Content / composition
comp.addOtherHint: Adds a row for unaccounted content, pre-filled to reach 100%.
comp.help: Leave empty if composition is unknown. Otherwise rows must sum to exactly 100%.
comp.errEmptyFibre: Every composition row needs a fibre name.
comp.errDuplicate: Composition has duplicate fibres — combine them into one row.

fabricLibrary.stockSaveError: Could not record stock. Try again.
fabricLibrary.stockHelp: Record a fabric receipt or adjustment. Consumption is deducted automatically when a design is approved.

editRequests.title: Edit requests
editRequests.subtitle: Floor managers route edits here when a lot's 24-hour direct-edit window has passed.

editDialog.title: Edit received qty
editDialog.confirmHint: This change will be recorded in the audit log.

productionKpis.title: Production KPIs
productionKpis.subtitle: Floor output across Yesterday, the Last 7 days, and This month.
productionKpis.notLive: Sheet not connected yet — KPIs will appear once it’s reachable.
productionKpis.failedHint: The request failed. Check your connection and try again.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who can sign in and what they can do.
users.empty: No users yet. Add your first one to get started.

form.name: Full name
form.mobileImmutable: Mobile cannot be changed after creation

errors.duplicate: A user with this mobile number already exists.
errors.generic: Could not save user. Please try again.

users.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate {{name}}? They will no longer be able to sign in.

data.title: Master data
data.subtitle: Manage vendors, SKUs and the data the floor sees.

cards.vendorsBody: Brands and external partners that ship lots in.
cards.skusBody: SKU catalog used across cutting, stitching and finishing.

slide1.title: Welcome to NOWI ERP
slide1.body: Receive lots from vendors, assign them to stitching masters, and keep production moving.

slide2.title: Receive a lot
slide2.body: Tap Receive new lot on your home screen. Enter the vendor challan and per-size quantities for each style.

slide3.title: Assign to a master
slide3.body: Each received lot lands in Pending assignment. Tap Assign on a card and pick a stitching master — least-loaded shown first.

slide4.title: Edit within 24 hours
slide4.body: Made a typo on receive? Tap Edit on the lot card within 24 hours. After that, send an edit request and the admin can apply it.

slide1.title: Welcome to NOWI ERP
slide1.body: Track every lot you stitch — right from your phone.

slide2.title: Your queue
slide2.body: The Your lots tab shows lots assigned to you by the floor manager. Tap one to open it.

slide3.title: Forward to finishing
slide3.body: On a lot, set the per-size quantity you have stitched (tap a size chip to forward all of it). Then tap Forward to send it to finishing.

slide1.title: Welcome to NOWI ERP
slide1.body: Track every lot through finishing and dispatch.

slide2.title: Receive and mark rework
slide2.body: Open a lot, enter what you received from stitching. Use Mark rework to flag defective pieces with a reason and photo.

slide3.title: Generate dispatch challan
slide3.body: When a lot is ready, pick the destination warehouse and generate a dispatch challan in one tap.

slide1.title: Welcome to NOWI ERP
slide1.body: You have full visibility across cutting, stitching, finishing and dispatch.

slide2.title: Locator and filters
slide2.body: Use the Locator to find any SKU, lot or order. Filter by vendor, stage, status or date range.

slide3.title: Dispatch reconciliation
slide3.body: Reconcile dispatches against GRN events. Edit received quantities with an audit trail when needed.

slide1.title: Welcome to NOWI ERP
slide1.body: Keep master data clean — vendors, SKUs, and the data the floor depends on.

slide2.title: Vendors and SKUs
slide2.body: Add or edit vendors and SKUs from the side menu. Changes show up on the floor immediately.

slide3.title: Where the floor sees this
slide3.body: Vendors appear in the Receive-from-Kotty form. SKUs appear on every lot, dispatch and locator row.

slide1.title: Welcome to NOWI ERP
slide1.body: Read-only access to lots, dispatches and floor activity.

slide2.title: Locator overview
slide2.body: Use the Locator to drill into any SKU and see where its inventory currently sits.

slide3.title: Alerts and reports
slide3.body: Watch the dashboard for throughput, rework and cycle-time signals across the floor.

pwa.installBody: Add the app to your home screen for faster access on the floor.

statusDetail.listingsPending: No channels prepared yet — add listings to begin.
statusDetail.sampleApproved: Sample signed off — ready to start cataloguing.

toast.easyecomFirst: Mark EasyEcom done before going live.
